translated: [CORNER: Story Watchalong] All right, I've picked out some scenes I personally wanted to talk about, so let's watch them together.

To be precise, it's a story that spans Episodes 6 and 7. In Episode 6, there's a woman who wants to wear these clothes but worries they won't suit her. Mizuki feels a connection to that, which leads into Episode 7.
"Even if I wore something like this..."
They're going together. They haven't been able to go around the shops with Miku and the others yet.
"Were you interested in that dress over there?"
Being able to say that is actually quite profound,
If I call them "my kid," people might say they're not mine, so I should be careful,
but I definitely think of them as my kid.
"I'm perfectly happy just watching from here."
This story was so good too.
"If you'd like, would you care to just try this on?"
She really is the best big sister.
If you're interested in the dress, you'd wish someone would talk to you like this.
I feel like that's what they'd say.
I'm the type who feels awkward when approached.
when they're shouting "30% off," I sometimes get nervous thinking, "Oh no, what if they talk to me?"
"This is a very personal story, but I actually designed this dress myself."
"I made it hoping it would reach someone who loves cute things."
"So if you think it's cute, I'd be very happy just to have you try it on."
What I find so wonderful about Yuki-san's performance is how she brings out parts that feel similar to me,
and I can feel through her acting that she's mindful of the space I leave when I say something is "cute." I'd love to do an AfterTalk with Big Sis someday.
That's the second person I've seen up close being encouraged by her words,
"Then, let me show you to the fitting room."
"I'm glad that customer decided to try it on."
"That customer has been to the shop before."
"But she always seemed hesitant to try anything on."
"I felt like speaking to her might just put more pressure on her, so I don't think I could've approached her without a reason like this."
It's so nice to really feel that sibling bond.
"Um, well, it's very cute and there's no problem, but..."
"If you'd like, why don't you take a look in the mirror outside?"
"I've prepared some shoes for you as well."
"I'll lead you to the large mirror."
I really like Big Sis's outfit here, her casual clothes.
"As the designer, it makes me very happy."
"It's a bit of a strange feeling."
